purpose: Draft (inactive) question objects derived from the Vinci 2026-07-08 quiz-1a batch -- a typed, 39-question multiple-choice 'LIFEBOATMAN & WATER SURVIVAL FINAL REVIEW QUIZ #1' with hand-circled correct answers, plus a diagram sheet (D011SA lifeboat interior, D015SA liferaft). These are NOT part of src/content/course.json's live "questions" array and will not appear in the app until explicitly promoted, after each question's verificationStatus is upgraded from draft-unverified and each fact is checked against Vinci's confirmed manual copy.
activationRule: Do not add any of these questions to course.json unless its verificationStatus has been changed away from 'draft-unverified' following direct confirmation against the manual. Update 2026-07-09 (see vinci-held-question-remediation-report.md for full detail): the four image-based questions (q-quiz1a-d011sa-flemming-gear, q-quiz1a-d015sa-righting-strap, q-quiz1a-d015sa-heavingline-number, q-quiz1a-d015sa-pressurevalve) now use cropped, per-diagram images (2026-07-08_044219-8-d011sa.jpg / -d015sa.jpg) instead of the original shared photo -- the D014SA/D015SA diagram-naming mismatch remains unresolved as a citation-only footnote (it's never asserted in any prompt/choice text, so it doesn't block promotion). q-quiz1a-bow-stern-hatchet's claim is now independently confirmed by 46 CFR 169.529(k) (see its sourceReference) and no longer needs manual/Vinci confirmation. q-quiz1a-liferaft-cold-protection and q-quiz1a-seaanchor-substitute remain blocked on their own separate issue (medium-confidence pencil-mark reading, not source verification) -- unaffected by this update.
duplicateCheckNotes: Cross-referenced against all 145 live questions in src/content/course.json AND both prior unpromoted draft packs (vinci-2026-07-07-draft-question-pack.json, 6 remaining questions; vinci-2026-07-08-quiz-review-1-draft-question-pack.json, 19 questions) before drafting -- 170 existing question objects checked in total. Skipped as duplicates: question 11 (correct-answer marking is genuinely ambiguous -- two overlapping pencil circles with no way to resolve which was final, per instructions), question 19 (finding a capsized liferaft's correct side via the CO2-cylinder/righting-strap technique -- already tested four ways by live q-raft-2, q-raft-7, and q-raft-11, plus the general technique in q-raft-1; this question's 'too dark to read the stencil' framing doesn't add enough beyond those four to justify a fifth), and question 28 (limber holes allow bilge liquid to flow to the drain -- already tested by live q-gloss-limber AND flagged as a near-duplicate in the pending draft q-vinci-limber-holes AND independently skipped as a duplicate in the 2026-07-08-quiz-review-1 batch; this would be a fourth occurrence of the identical fact with no new angle). Several included questions deliberately test a distinct angle from a related existing question rather than being excluded as duplicates -- see each question's sourceReference for the specific relationship noted (e.g. question 10 tests WHERE the lifeboatmen figure is documented vs. the already-promoted question's specific table VALUE; question 29 tests WHERE buoyancy units are located vs. the pending draft's WHAT they're made of; question 31 is a clean, correctly-framed toggle-pin question that resolves the framing problem flagged in the pending q-vinci-togglepin-vs-pintlegudgeon's promotion review).

promotionHistory.promotedTo: src/content/course.json (verificationStatus set to quiz-derived-study, per the study-app status model)
promotionHistory.note: Promotion of the 'promote as-is' set identified in src/content/imports/vinci-2026-07-08-quiz-1a-promotion-review.md. The remaining 8 questions below stay in this file, inactive: q-quiz1a-enclosed-lifeboat-maxspeed (promote-after-light-wording-check, not yet done); q-quiz1a-liferaft-cold-protection and q-quiz1a-seaanchor-substitute (medium-confidence answer markings, hold for verification); q-quiz1a-bow-stern-hatchet (uncorroborated claim, hold for verification); q-quiz1a-d011sa-flemming-gear, q-quiz1a-d015sa-righting-strap, q-quiz1a-d015sa-heavingline-number, q-quiz1a-d015sa-pressurevalve (diagram/image issues -- shared uncropped image, 3 of the 4 also have the unresolved D014SA/D015SA naming mismatch).

promotionHistory.promotedTo: src/content/course.json (verificationStatus set per the recommendation in vinci-held-question-remediation-report.md)
promotionHistory.note: Final promotion of this pack's remaining held questions. The 5 questions across all three packs that the remediation report still flagged as needing source/manual verification were promoted anyway, at their recommended needs-review status, per explicit instruction to put them in front of Vinci for review/flagging rather than continuing to withhold them from the app. This pack now has 0 questions remaining.
